criteria.name: Keys not logged or exposed
criteria.prompt: Are API keys properly protected? Check: not logged in plain text, not returned in full after creation, stored hashed. Answer yes/no with details.

criteria.name: Timing-safe comparison
criteria.check: Uses hmac.compare_digest or secrets.compare_digest for key comparison

criteria.name: Rate limiting implemented
criteria.check: Rate limiting logic exists with per-key tracking
